title: Supreme Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew with a rich flavor profile.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the onion and garlic. Cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the carrot and potato. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth and water (if using). Stir to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the savory (if using). Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
